member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin
member.summary: Contract every FocusTracker plugin must implement. Discovered at host startup, initialised with an , and shut down when the host exits.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Id
member.summary: Unique reverse-DNS identifier. Must not change across versions. Example: "com.yourname.myplugin"

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Name
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown in the plugin store.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Version
member.summary: Semantic version string. Example: "1.0.0"

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Author
member.summary: Author or organisation name.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Description
member.summary: Short description (≤ 140 chars) of what the plugin does.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.GetUserHelp
member.summary:
Returns the user-facing help content for this plugin.
⚠️ This method is REQUIRED. Any plugin class that does not implement it will fail to compile with the error: "does not implement interface member 'IFocusPlugin.GetUserHelp()'"
The returned must not be null. This method is called by the host at load time (before runs) so it must not depend on any initialised state — keep it pure and stateless.
The content is displayed in Plugin Manager → Mis plugins → Ayuda.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Initialize(FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext)
member.summary: Called once after the host finishes its startup sequence. Subscribe to events, register settings, and store the context here.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IFocusPlugin.Shutdown
member.summary: Called when the host is about to exit. Release resources, flush data, unsubscribe from events.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext
member.summary: Sandboxed API surface provided to every plugin via . All methods are thread-safe; event callbacks are delivered on the UI thread.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.IsTracking
member.summary: True while a tracking session is active.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetCurrentFocusedApp
member.summary: Display name of the app/URL currently in focus, or null.

member.name: E:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.FocusChanged
member.summary: Fires on the UI thread when the focused app changes. (displayName, durationOnPrevious)

member.name: E:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.AlarmTriggered
member.summary: Fires on the UI thread when a session or project alarm threshold is exceeded. (title, message)

member.name: E:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.IdleDetected
member.summary: Fires on the UI thread when idle-detection stops tracking.

member.name: E:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.TrackingStarted
member.summary: Fires on the UI thread right after a tracking session starts. The parameter is the project ID (or null for free/quick sessions).

member.name: E:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.TrackingStopped
member.summary: Fires on the UI thread right after a tracking session stops.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetAllSessions
member.summary: All sessions ordered by start time descending.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetSessionsInRange(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Sessions whose start time falls within [from, to].

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetCurrentSession
member.summary: The currently active session, or null if not tracking.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetSessionDetail(System.Int32)
member.summary: Per-app usage summaries for a single session.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetUsageSummaries(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Per-app summaries for the given range, optionally filtered to a project. Ordered by total time descending.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetTodaySummaries(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Today's summaries (midnight → now), optionally scoped to a project.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetTotalTrackedTime(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Total tracked time (focus + unfocus) across the given range.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetAllProjects
member.summary: All projects ordered alphabetically.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetProject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Project by ID, or null if not found.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetProjectSummaries(FocusTracker.Models.Project,System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Project summaries split into explicitly tracked (main) and incidental (extras).

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetDataFolder
member.summary: Path to the folder where FocusTracker stores its database.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetNotificationSoundEnabled
member.summary: Whether the host has notification sounds enabled.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.GetIdleDetectionEnabled
member.summary: Whether idle-detection is enabled in host settings.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.CreateProject(System.String,System.String[],System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Creates a project and returns its new ID.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.UpdateProject(System.Int32,System.String,System.String[],System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Updates an existing project.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.DeleteProject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a project. Sessions are preserved but unlinked. Irreversible.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.RenameSession(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Renames a session. Pass empty string to restore default label.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.AssignSessionToProject(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Links or unlinks a session from a project.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.DeleteSession(System.Int32)
member.summary: Permanently deletes a session and all its events. Irreversible.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.AddTrackedApp(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds an app to the running session. No-op if tracking is stopped.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.AddTrackedUrl(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a URL host to the running session. Sub-domains match automatically. No-op if tracking is stopped.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.RegisterSetting(FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor)
member.summary: Contributes a setting item to the host's Settings page under a named tab. Call during .

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.RefreshSettings(System.Action)
member.summary: Clears all previously registered settings for this plugin, invokes (which should call for every desired setting), then tells the host to rebuild the settings UI. Use this to update the settings panel dynamically without restarting the app — for example, to show a new item after it is added, or to hide a conditional field.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.NavigateToPluginSettings
member.summary: Navigates the host application to the Settings page and activates the tab that belongs to this plugin.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.RegisterButton(FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution)
member.summary: Contributes a button to a host screen. Buttons appear in a dedicated plugin row below the screen's native controls. Call during .

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.RegisterHomeCard(FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution)
member.summary: Contributes a data card to the Home screen. Cards appear below the built-in home content inside their own card UI. When is greater than zero the host will call periodically. Call during .

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.ShowNotification(System.String,System.String,FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastKind)
member.summary: Shows a temporary toast that auto-dismisses after a few seconds. Plays the system sound if the user has notification sounds enabled.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.ShowPersistentNotification(System.String,System.String,FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastKind,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastAction})
member.summary: Shows a persistent toast that stays on screen until the user dismisses it. Always shows a close (×) button. Optionally shows up to three action buttons. Plays the system sound if the user has notification sounds enabled.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.PlaySound(FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound)
member.summary: Plays a Windows system sound — but ONLY if the user has notification sounds enabled in the host's settings. Use this for event-driven audio.

member.name: M:FocusTracker.Plugins.IPluginContext.ShowNotificationWithSound(System.String,System.String,FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastKind,FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound)
member.summary: Shows a temporary toast AND plays a system sound unconditionally, bypassing the host's notification-sound setting. Use for alerts that must always produce audio feedback.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginScreenTarget
member.summary: The host screen where a plugin can contribute buttons or content cards.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginScreenTarget.Home
member.summary: The main home / start page.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginScreenTarget.Dashboard
member.summary: The usage dashboard page.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginScreenTarget.Sessions
member.summary: The sessions list page.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginScreenTarget.Projects
member.summary: The projects page.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginScreenTarget.LiveTracking
member.summary: The live-tracking overlay shown while a session is active.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonStyle
member.summary: Visual style of a plugin-contributed button. Each style maps 1-to-1 to an existing host button style.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonStyle.Primary
member.summary: Filled with the product accent colour (lime-green). Use for main CTAs.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonStyle.Default
member.summary: Transparent background with grey border. General-purpose default.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonStyle.Secondary
member.summary: Like Default but tinted with the unfocus orange. Use for secondary actions.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonStyle.Tertiary
member.summary: Like Default but tinted with the link blue. Use for informational actions.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonStyle.Danger
member.summary: Red-tinted border. Use for destructive / stop actions.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution
member.summary: Describes a button that a plugin contributes to a host screen. Create one per button and pass it to .

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution.Screen
member.summary: The screen where this button will appear. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution.Label
member.summary: Button text. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution.Icon
member.summary: Optional Fluent Icons / Segoe MDL2 Assets unicode character (e.g. "\uE768"). When set, the icon is displayed to the left of the label at the standard size.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution.Style
member.summary: Visual style. Defaults to .

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution.OnClicked
member.summary: Called on the UI thread when the button is clicked. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginButtonContribution.GetIsVisible
member.summary: Optional callback that the host calls periodically on the UI thread to decide whether to show or hide this button. Return true = visible, false = collapsed. When null (default) the button is always visible.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardRow
member.summary: A single row inside a .

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardRow.Label
member.summary: Left-aligned label / key text. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardRow.Value
member.summary: Optional right-aligned value text.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardRow.IsHeader
member.summary: When true, this row is rendered as a section header (bold, muted colour, no value column).

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution
member.summary: Describes a card that a plugin contributes to the Home screen. Create one and pass it to .

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution.Title
member.summary: Card title shown in the header. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution.Icon
member.summary: Optional Fluent Icons / Segoe MDL2 Assets icon shown next to the title.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution.GetRows
member.summary: Called on the UI thread to produce the card rows. Return an empty list to render an empty-state message. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution.OnCardClicked
member.summary: Optional callback invoked when the user clicks anywhere on the card. When non-null the card renders with a hand cursor and a hover highlight. Typical use: navigate to this plugin's settings tab via IPluginContext.NavigateToPluginSettings().

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginCardContribution.AutoRefreshSeconds
member.summary: When greater than zero the host refreshes this card automatically every AutoRefreshSeconds seconds. Set to 0 (default) for a static card that only renders once.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastKind
member.summary: Visual kind of a notification toast (controls icon and accent colour).

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastAction
member.summary: An action button inside a persistent notification toast. Only supported for persistent toasts (ignored on temporary ones).

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastAction.Label
member.summary: Button label. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginToastAction.OnClicked
member.summary: Called on the UI thread when the button is clicked. Required.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginHelpSection
member.summary: A single section inside a plugin's user-help page.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginHelpSection.Heading
member.summary: Section heading shown in bold. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginHelpSection.Body
member.summary: Body text for this section. Supports plain text only. Required.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginHelpContent
member.summary:
The complete user-help content for a plugin. Returned by and rendered by the host in the Plugin Manager's "Ayuda" screen.
Every plugin MUST return a non-null instance with a non-empty . Plugins that do not implement will not compile.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginHelpContent.Summary
member.summary: One-paragraph overview of what the plugin does. Shown at the top of the help screen before the sections. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginHelpContent.Sections
member.summary: Ordered list of help sections. May be empty for simple plugins.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound
member.summary: Windows built-in system sounds available to plugins. Maps to members.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound.Asterisk
member.summary: The system "Asterisk" / information sound.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound.Beep
member.summary: The system "Beep" / generic beep.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound.Exclamation
member.summary: The system "Exclamation" / warning sound.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound.Hand
member.summary: The system "Hand" / critical-stop sound.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.WindowsSystemSound.Question
member.summary: The system "Question" sound.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType
member.summary: Defines how the user interacts with a plugin-contributed setting item.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.Toggle
member.summary: An on/off toggle switch.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.TextInput
member.summary: A single-line text input field.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.FilePicker
member.summary: A path display + "Browse…" button for picking a file.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.FolderPicker
member.summary: A path display + "Browse…" button for picking a folder.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.Button
member.summary: A labelled action button. Supports danger (red) style.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.Select
member.summary: A dropdown selector with a fixed list of string options.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.Label
member.summary: A read-only section header / divider. Renders the Title in bold and the Description as muted text below it, with no interactive control. Use to visually group settings within a tab.

member.name: F:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingType.AutoComplete
member.summary: A text input with a live-filtered suggestion dropdown. The host calls on every keystroke and renders up to eight results below the field. Committing a suggestion (click or Enter) calls . Use for placeholder text and for the initial value.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor
member.summary: Describes a single setting item contributed by a plugin to the host's Settings page. Create one per setting and pass it to .

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.TabName
member.summary: Tab name in the Settings page. Created automatically if it does not exist. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.Title
member.summary: Bold heading shown above the control. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.Description
member.summary: Optional muted supporting text below the title.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.Type
member.summary: Controls how the setting is rendered. Required.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.FileFilter
member.summary: Win32 filter string, e.g. "JSON files|*.json|All files|*.*". FilePicker only.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.ButtonIsDanger
member.summary: When true the button is styled red. Use for destructive actions.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.ButtonIsSecondary
member.summary: When true the button is styled with the secondary (orange) accent colour. Use for primary call-to-action settings buttons.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.AutoCompleteGetSuggestions
member.summary: Called on every keystroke with the current query string. Return up to eight suggestion display strings; return null or empty to suppress the popup. Must be fast (≤ 10 ms) — it runs on the UI thread.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Plugins.PluginSettingDescriptor.OnAutoCompleteCommitted
member.summary: Called when the user confirms a value — either by clicking a suggestion from the dropdown or by pressing Enter in the text field. Receives the exact suggestion string that was selected (or the raw typed text).

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Models.TrackingSession
member.summary: A recorded focus-tracking session.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Models.TrackingSession.DisplayName
member.summary: Friendly label: uses when set, otherwise "Session #Id".

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Models.Project
member.summary: A user-defined project grouping tracked apps and URLs.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Models.Project.TrackedKeys
member.summary: Comma-separated process names or URL hosts tracked by this project.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Models.Project.UsePomodoro
member.summary: When true, the Pomodoro plugin (if installed) auto-starts with sessions of this project.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Models.TrackingItem
member.summary: Lightweight resolved item from a project's tracked-key string.

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Models.AppUsageSummary
member.summary: Per-app aggregated usage summary for a given time range. Focus time = actively in the foreground; unfocus time = open but not focused.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Models.AppUsageSummary.IsProjectExtra
member.summary: True when this entry came from a project session but is not in the project's tracked keys.

member.name: P:FocusTracker.Models.AppUsageSummary.FormattedTime
member.summary: Pre-formatted total time (e.g. "1h 5m 30s").

member.name: T:FocusTracker.Models.DateRangePreset
member.summary: Preset date ranges for use with IPluginContext.GetUsageSummaries.
